title: gnaphalium zollingeri
intro: Gnaphalium zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's cudweed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the relief of respiratory issues. Gnaphalium zollingeri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
